cat:name.gco:CharacterString: Codelists from the Metadata for Reference System (mrs) Namespace

cat:scope.gco:CharacterString: Codelists from the Metadata for Reference System (mrs) Namespace

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: defines type of reference system used

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: defines type of reference system used

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: compound statio-parametric coordinate reference system containing an engineering coordinate reference system and a parametric reference system. e.g. [local] x, y, pressure

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: compound statio-parametric coordinate reference system containing an engineering coordinate reference system and a parametric reference system. e.g. [local] x, y, pressure

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: compound statio-parametric-temporal coordinate reference system containing an engineering, a parametric, and a temporal coordinate reference system. e.g. [local] x, y, pressure, time

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: compound statio-parametric-temporal coordinate reference system containing an engineering, a parametric, and a temporal coordinate reference system. e.g. [local] x, y, pressure, time

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: compound spatio-temporal coordinate reference system containing an engineering and a temporal coordinate reference system. e.g. [local] x, y, time

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: compound spatio-temporal coordinate reference system containing an engineering and a temporal coordinate reference system. e.g. [local] x, y, time

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: compound spatial reference system containing a horizontal engineering coordinate reference system and a vertical coordinate reference system. e.g. [local] x, y, height

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: compound spatial reference system containing a horizontal engineering coordinate reference system and a vertical coordinate reference system. e.g. [local] x, y, height

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: compound spatio-temporal coordinate reference system containing an engineering, a vertical, and a temporal coordinate reference system. e.g. [local] x, y, height, time

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: compound spatio-temporal coordinate reference system containing an engineering, a vertical, and a temporal coordinate reference system. e.g. [local] x, y, height, time

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: compound statio-parametric coordinate reference system containing a 2 dimensional geographic horizontal coordinate reference system and a parametric reference system. e.g. latitude, longitude, pressure

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: compound statio-parametric coordinate reference system containing a 2 dimensional geographic horizontal coordinate reference system and a parametric reference system. e.g. latitude, longitude, pressure

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: compound statio-parametric-temporal coordinate reference system containing a 2 dimensional geographic horizontal, a parametric and a temporal coordinate reference system. e.g. latitude, longitude, pressure, time

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: compound statio-parametric-temporal coordinate reference system containing a 2 dimensional geographic horizontal, a parametric and a temporal coordinate reference system. e.g. latitude, longitude, pressure, time

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: compound spatio-temporal coordinate reference system containing a 2 dimensional geographic horizontal coordinate reference system and a temporal reference system. e.g. latitude, longitude, time

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: compound spatio-temporal coordinate reference system containing a 2 dimensional geographic horizontal coordinate reference system and a temporal reference system. e.g. latitude, longitude, time

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: compound coordinate reference system in which one constituent coordinate reference system is a horizontal geodetic coordinate reference system and one is a vertical coordinate reference system. e.g. latitude, longitude, [gravity-related] height or depth

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: compound coordinate reference system in which one constituent coordinate reference system is a horizontal geodetic coordinate reference system and one is a vertical coordinate reference system. e.g. latitude, longitude, [gravity-related] height or depth

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: compound spatio-temporal coordinate reference system containing a 2 dimensional geographic horizontal, a vertical, and a temporal coordinate reference system. e.g. latitude, longitude, height, time

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: compound spatio-temporal coordinate reference system containing a 2 dimensional geographic horizontal, a vertical, and a temporal coordinate reference system. e.g. latitude, longitude, height, time

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: compound spatio-temporal coordinate reference system containing a 3 dimensional geographic and a temporal coordinate reference system. e.g. latitude, longitude, ellipsoidal height, time

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: compound spatio-temporal coordinate reference system containing a 3 dimensional geographic and a temporal coordinate reference system. e.g. latitude, longitude, ellipsoidal height, time

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: compound statio-parametric coordinate reference system containing a projected horizontal coordinate reference system and a parametric reference system. e.g. easting, northing, density

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: compound statio-parametric coordinate reference system containing a projected horizontal coordinate reference system and a parametric reference system. e.g. easting, northing, density

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: compound statio-parametric-temporal coordinate reference system containing a projected horizontal, a parametric, and a temporal coordinate reference system. e.g. easting, northing, density, time

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: compound statio-parametric-temporal coordinate reference system containing a projected horizontal, a parametric, and a temporal coordinate reference system. e.g. easting, northing, density, time

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: compound spatio-temporal coordinate reference system containing a projected horizontal and a temporal coordinate reference system. e.g. easting, northing, time

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: compound spatio-temporal coordinate reference system containing a projected horizontal and a temporal coordinate reference system. e.g. easting, northing, time

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: compound spatial reference system containing a horizontal projected coordinate reference system and a vertical coordinate reference system. e.g. easting, northing, [gravity-related] height or depth

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: compound spatial reference system containing a horizontal projected coordinate reference system and a vertical coordinate reference system. e.g. easting, northing, [gravity-related] height or depth

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: compound spatio-temporal coordinate reference system containing a projected horizontal, a vertical, and a temporal coordinate reference system. e.g. easting, northing, height, time

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: compound spatio-temporal coordinate reference system containing a projected horizontal, a vertical, and a temporal coordinate reference system. e.g. easting, northing, height, time

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: coordinate reference system based on an engineering datum (datum describing the relationship of a coordinate system to a local reference). e.g. [local] x,y

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: coordinate reference system based on an engineering datum (datum describing the relationship of a coordinate system to a local reference). e.g. [local] x,y

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: engineering coordinate reference system in which the base representation of a moving object is specified. e.g. [local] x,y

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: engineering coordinate reference system in which the base representation of a moving object is specified. e.g. [local] x,y

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: coordinate reference system based on an image datum (engineering datum which defines the relationship of a coordinate system to an image). e.g. row, column

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: coordinate reference system based on an image datum (engineering datum which defines the relationship of a coordinate system to an image). e.g. row, column

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: geodetic CRS having a Cartesian 3D coordinate system. e.g. [geocentric] X,Y,Z

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: geodetic CRS having a Cartesian 3D coordinate system. e.g. [geocentric] X,Y,Z

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: geodetic CRS having an ellipsoidal 2D coordinate system. e.g. latitude, longitude

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: geodetic CRS having an ellipsoidal 2D coordinate system. e.g. latitude, longitude

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: geodetic CRS having an ellipsoidal 3D coordinate system. e.g. latitude, longitude, ellipsoidal height

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: geodetic CRS having an ellipsoidal 3D coordinate system. e.g. latitude, longitude, ellipsoidal height

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: spatial reference in the form of a label or code that identifies a location. e.g. post code

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: spatial reference in the form of a label or code that identifies a location. e.g. post code

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: set of Linear Referencing Methods and the policies, records and procedures for implementing them. reference system that identifies a location by reference to a segment of a linear geographic feature and distance along that segment from a given point. e.g. x km along road

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: set of Linear Referencing Methods and the policies, records and procedures for implementing them. reference system that identifies a location by reference to a segment of a linear geographic feature and distance along that segment from a given point. e.g. x km along road

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: coordinate reference system based on a parametric datum (datum describing the relationship of a parametric coordinate system to an object). e.g. pressure

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: coordinate reference system based on a parametric datum (datum describing the relationship of a parametric coordinate system to an object). e.g. pressure

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: coordinate reference system derived from a two-dimensional geodetic coordinate reference system by applying a map projection. e.g. easting, northing

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: coordinate reference system derived from a two-dimensional geodetic coordinate reference system by applying a map projection. e.g. easting, northing

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: reference system against which time is measured. e.g. time

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: reference system against which time is measured. e.g. time

cat:definition.gco:CharacterString: one-dimensional coordinate reference system based on a vertical datum (datum describing the relation of gravity-related heights or depths to the Earth). e.g. [gravity-related] height or depth

cat:description.gco:CharacterString: one-dimensional coordinate reference system based on a vertical datum (datum describing the relation of gravity-related heights or depths to the Earth). e.g. [gravity-related] height or depth
